name: Santorini
author: Gordon Hamilton / Roxley Games — AGP port
description: Santorini (Gordon Hamilton, Roxley Games) — the base game with NO god powers. Two players each control 2 Workers on a 5x5 grid. Each turn you move one Worker to an adjacent space (at most one level up, any number down, never onto a dome or another Worker) and then build on a space adjacent to its new position, raising that space's building level by one (a build on a level-3 building places a dome). Win by moving one of your Workers up onto a level-3 building; you also win if your opponent has no legal move.
